# GitHub Actions Status Badges

Add these badges to your README.md to show security scan status:

## Security Vulnerability Scan
```markdown
[![Security Scan](https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/tri-nexus/actions/workflows/security-scan.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/tri-nexus/actions/workflows/security-scan.yml)
```

## SAST Security Scan
```markdown
[![SAST Scan](https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/tri-nexus/actions/workflows/sast-scan.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/tri-nexus/actions/workflows/sast-scan.yml)
```

## Combined Badge Section

```markdown
## Security Status

[![Security Scan](https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/tri-nexus/actions/workflows/security-scan.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/tri-nexus/actions/workflows/security-scan.yml)
[![SAST Scan](https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/tri-nexus/actions/workflows/sast-scan.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/tri-nexus/actions/workflows/sast-scan.yml)
```

**Replace `YOUR_USERNAME` with your actual GitHub username or organization name.**

## Example

If your repository is at `https://github.com/johndoe/tri-nexus`, use:

```markdown
[![Security Scan](https://github.com/johndoe/tri-nexus/actions/workflows/security-scan.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/johndoe/tri-nexus/actions/workflows/security-scan.yml)
```
